text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, Luna loved collecting oddities. Everywhere she went, little treasures stuck to her robes. One day, she heard whispers of a mystical relic—a feather belonging to a graceful owl. Obsessed, she chased it through forests. Finally, she found it hidden among moss. Ancient runes glowed across its plumage. With awe.

That night, dreams brought stories of wisdom. Owl wisdom.

She learned. Forgiveness flew.

Owl feathers grace you.

Now Luna cares for sparrows. Friends.

Such beauty.

Such love.

Such peace.


























Great owl.








Just owl.








You love owls.



You'll look nice.




Here now.




Maybe.




Just.




That's okay.




You're lovely.




I love you.




Maybe I never will.




That's fine.




Just be.

I think you're amazing.




You should.





That's nice.







I like sparrows.




They're good.



So lucky.




You've got wings.




You
